title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Resonance International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Resonance International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Resonance International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Chandigarh-based team.

About Resonance International Enterprises:
Resonance International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Resonance International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
